item.title: About me
item.description:
受到 Lil’s Log 的啟發，覺得如此書寫網站的方式簡潔又順眼，符合心中對網站的完美期待，覺得這種寫法太棒了，於是決定開始書寫。

Education

2023 - 2025, M.S. in Computer Science, National Chengchi University
2019 - 2023, B.S. in Mathematics, National Chung Cheng University

Experience

2025 Pegatron Corporation – AI engineer semester Intern

Awards and Honors

2024 ICS (International Computer Symposium) – Conference Oral Presentation
2024 AICUP TW (UAV Reconnaissance Generative-AI Navigation Competition) – 4th Place
2024 National Chengchi University AI and Sustainability Innovation Competition – 1st Place
2024 Taoyuan Social Enterprise Entrepreneurship Competition and 9th Yunus Award – 2nd Place
